zh.lifeSummary: 當Jothan Wheelock於1799年出生在美國佛蒙特州溫莎女爵卡文迪什時，他的父親John Gleason Wheelock25歲，母親Lavina Clark22歲。他於1823年6月12日與Hannah Warner在美國紐約州結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和5個女兒的父母。他於1830年住在美國紐約州阿爾班尼沃特福利特且於1840年住在美國紐約州艾利蘭卡斯特蘭卡斯特。他去世於1848年7月8日在美國紐約州艾利布費阿洛享年49歲，埋葬在美國紐約州艾利布費阿洛科華士 勞 其特利。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Jothan Wheelock于1799年出生在美国佛蒙特州溫莎女爵卡文迪什时，他的父亲John Gleason Wheelock25岁，母亲Lavina Clark22岁。他于1823年6月12日与Hannah Warner在美国纽约州结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和5个女儿的父母。他于1830年住在美国纽约州阿爾班尼沃特福利特且于1840年住在美国纽约州艾利蘭卡斯特蘭卡斯特。他去世于1848年7月8日在美国纽约州艾利布費阿洛享年49岁，埋葬在美国纽约州艾利布費阿洛科華士 勞 其特利。

nameMeanings.name: Wheelock
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Worcestershire and Staffordshire): habitational name from a place so named in Cheshire. The placename is derived from the river Wheelock; the river name means ‘winding river’, from British Suilāco-.

nameMeanings.name: Jothan
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Older Scottish spelling of Joan , which was traditionally pronounced as two syllables.

variants.name: Jan
meanings: As a boy's name this represents a revival of Middle English Jan, a by‐form of John , or an adoption of the common European form with this spelling. As a girl's name it is a short form of names such as Janet and Janice .

variants.name: Jon
meanings: Simplified spelling of   John   or a short form of   Jonathan .  The name is borne by the Canadian singer  Jon Vickers  (  b. 1926 ) and the American actor  Jon Voight  (  b. 1938 ).

variants.name: John
meanings: Greek: the Lord gave graciously; whom Jehovah gave; whom Jehovah bestowed.

historicEvents.title: Movement to Washington D.C.
historicEvents.description: While the growth of the new nation was exponential, the United States didn’t have permanent location to house the Government. The First capital was temporary in New York City but by the second term of George Washington the Capital moved to Philadelphia for the following 10 years. Ultimately during the Presidency of John Adams, the Capital found a permanent home in the District of Columbia.
France sells Louisiana territories to U.S.A.

historicEvents.title: Panic! of 1819
historicEvents.description: With the Aftermath of the Napoleonic Wars the global market for trade was down. During this time, America had its first financial crisis and it lasted for only two years.
Historical Boundaries: 1821: Erie, New York, United States

historicEvents.title: The Second Great Awakening
historicEvents.description: Being a second spiritual and religious awakening, like the First Great Awakening, many Churches began to spring up from other denominations. Many people began to rapidly join the Baptist and Methodist congregations. Many converts to these religions believed that the Awakening was the precursor of a new millennial age.
U.S. acquires vast tracts of Mexican territory in wake of Mexican War including California and New Mexico.

en.lifeSummary: When Jothan Wheelock was born in 1799, in Cavendish, Windsor, Vermont, United States, his father, John Gleason Wheelock, was 25 and his mother, Lavina Clark, was 22. He married Hannah Warner on 12 June 1823, in New York, United States. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 5 daughters. He lived in Watervliet, Albany, New York, United States in 1830 and Lancaster, Lancaster, Erie, New York, United States in 1840. He died on 8 July 1848, in Buffalo, Erie, New York, United States, at the age of 49, and was buried in Forest Lawn Cemetery, Buffalo, Erie, New York, United States.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Jothan Wheelock est né en 1799, à Cavendish, Windsor, Vermont, États-Unis, son père, John Gleason Wheelock, avait 25 ans et sa mère, Lavina Clark, avait 22 ans. Il a épousé Hannah Warner le 12 juin 1823, à New York, États-Unis. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 5 filles. Il a vécu à Watervliet, Albany, New York, États-Unis en 1830 et à Lancaster, Lancaster, Erie, New York, États-Unis en 1840. Il est décédé le 8 juillet 1848, à Buffalo, Erie, New York, États-Unis, à l’âge de 49 ans, et a été enterré à Forest Lawn Cemetery, Buffalo, Erie, New York, États-Unis.

de.lifeSummary: Als Jothan Wheelock 1799 in Cavendish, Windsor, Vermont, Vereinigte Staaten geboren wurde, war sein Vater John Gleason Wheelock 25 und seine Mutter Lavina Clark 22. Er hat am 12. Juni 1823 in New York, Vereinigte Staaten Hannah Warner geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 5 Töchter. 1830 hat er in Watervliet, Albany, New York, Vereinigte Staaten und 1840 in Lancaster, Lancaster, Erie, New York, Vereinigte Staaten gelebt. Er starb am 8. Juli 1848 im Alter von 49 Jahren in Buffalo, Erie, New York, Vereinigte Staaten und wurde in Forest Lawn Cemetery, Buffalo, Erie, New York, Vereinigte Staaten begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Jothan Wheelock è nato il nel 1799 nel Cavendish, Windsor, Vermont, Stati Uniti d'America, il suo padre, John Gleason Wheelock, aveva 25 anni e il suo madre, Lavina Clark, aveva 22 anni. Lui sposato Hannah Warner il 12 giugno 1823, nel New York, Stati Uniti d'America. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 5 figlie. Vissuto a Watervliet, Albany, New York, Stati Uniti d'America nel 1830 e nel Lancaster, Lancaster, Erie, New York, Stati Uniti d'America nel 1840. Morì il 8 luglio 1848, nel Buffalo, Erie, New York, Stati Uniti d'America, all'età di 49 anni, e fu sepolto a Forest Lawn Cemetery, Buffalo, Erie, New York, Stati Uniti d'America.

ja.lifeSummary: Jothan Wheelockが1799年にアメリカ合衆国バーモント州ウィンドソルカベンディッシュで生まれた時，父John Gleason Wheelockは25歳，母Lavina Clarkは22歳であった。1823年6月12日にアメリカ合衆国ニューヨーク州でHannah Warnerと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と5人の娘の親であった。彼は1830年にはアメリカ合衆国ニューヨーク州アルバニーワテルvリートに，1840年にはアメリカ合衆国ニューヨーク州エリーランカスターランカスターに住んでいた。彼は1848年7月8日にアメリカ合衆国ニューヨーク州エリーブファロで49歳で死去し，アメリカ合衆国ニューヨーク州エリーブファロフォーエスト ラウン セメテリーにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Jothan Wheelock(이)가 1799년 미국 버몬트 주 윈드소르 카븐디시에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 John Gleason Wheelock(은)는 25세였고, 그의 어머니 Lavina Clark(은)는 22세였다. 그는 1823년 6월 12일 미국 뉴욕 주에서 Hannah Warner(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 다섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 1830년도에 미국 뉴욕 주 알바니 왓르블리트에서, 1840년도에 미국 뉴욕 주 에리 랭커스터 랭커스터에서 살았다. 그는 1848년 7월 8일 미국 뉴욕 주 에리 버팔로에서 49세의 나이로 사망했으며 미국 뉴욕 주 에리 버팔로 포레스트 로 세멧리에 묻혔다.

pt.Weathersfield, Windsor, Vermont, United: Weathersfield, Windsor, Vermonte, Estados Unidos da América
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Jothan Wheelock nasceu em 1799, em Cavendish, Windsor, Vermonte, Estados Unidos da América, seu pai, John Gleason Wheelock, tinha 25 anos e sua mãe, Lavina Clark, tinha 22 anos. Ele casou-se com Hannah Warner em 12 de junho de 1823, em Nova Iorque, Estados Unidos da América. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 5 filhas. Ele viveu em Watervliet, Albany, Nova Iorque, Estados Unidos da América em 1830 e em Lancaster, Lancaster, Erie, Nova Iorque, Estados Unidos da América em 1840. Ele faleceu em 8 de julho de 1848, em Buffalo, Erie, Nova Iorque, Estados Unidos da América, com 49 anos, e foi sepultado em Forest Lawn Cemetery, Buffalo, Erie, Nova Iorque, Estados Unidos da América.

ru.Lancaster, Erie, New York, United States: ланкастир, ланкастир, эри, Нью-Йорк, Соединенные штаты
ru.Forest Lawn Cemetery in Lancaster, Erie,: форест лавн кеметири, буффалоу, эри, Нью-Йорк, Соединенные штаты
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Jothan Wheelock родился в 1799 г. в местности кавендиш, виндзор, Вермонт, Соединенные штаты, его отцу по имени John Gleason Wheelock было 25 лет, а матери, которую звали Lavina Clark, 22. Он женился на женщине по имени Hannah Warner 12 июня 1823 г. в местности Нью-Йорк, Соединенные штаты. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 5 дочерей. Он жил в местности вэитирвльет, албани, Нью-Йорк, Соединенные штаты в 1830 году и в местности ланкастир, ланкастир, эри, Нью-Йорк, Соединенные штаты в 1840 году. Он умер 8 июля 1848 г. в местности буффалоу, эри, Нью-Йорк, Соединенные штаты в возрасте 49 лет и был похоронен в местности форест лавн кеметири, буффалоу, эри, Нью-Йорк, Соединенные штаты.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Jothan Wheelock nació en 1799, en Cavendish, Windsor, Vermont, Estados Unidos, su papá, John Gleason Wheelock, tenía 25 años y su mamá, Lavina Clark, tenía 22 años. Se casó con Hannah Warner el 12 de junio de 1823, en Nueva York, Estados Unidos. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 5 hijas. Vivió en Watervliet, Albany, Nueva York, Estados Unidos en 1830 y en Lancaster, Lancaster, Erie, Nueva York, Estados Unidos en 1840. Murió el 8 de julio de 1848, en Buffalo, Erie, Nueva York, Estados Unidos, a la edad de 49 años, y fue sepultado en Forest Lawn Cemetery, Buffalo, Erie, Nueva York, Estados Unidos.
